headline_seed: NTSB opens hearings on why UPS cargo plane engine fell off, causing deadly crash - AP News
draft_text:
NTSB opened a two-day hearing Tuesday on UPS Flight 2976, the MD-11 that crashed after takeoff in Louisville last November, killing 15. NPR reports a spherical bearing in the engine mount had failed four previous times on other planes.

And that's the mews.
